description: packages/sdk/package.json exists: name @cronpilot/sdk, version 0.1.0, type module, correct main/types/exports fields, vitest/typescript/@types/node as devDeps
packages/sdk/tsconfig.json exists extending the workspace base pattern (see packages/shared/tsconfig.json)
Cronpilot.ping() POSTs to correct URL with JSON body, returns Promise<void> on 2xx, default status ok
CronpilotClientError (4xx, no retry, has status: number) and CronpilotServerError (5xx/network, has status?: number and cause?: unknown) exported
5xx and network errors retry up to retries times (default 2) with 200ms * 2^attempt exponential backoff; 4xx does not retry
pnpm --filter @cronpilot/sdk build succeeds; dist/index.js and dist/index.d.ts are produced
pnpm --filter @cronpilot/sdk test passes all six cases: default ping URL, body fields (status/duration/exitCode), 4xx no-retry, 5xx retry, network retry, timeout
